description: An introduction to the Anchor Framework featuring Armani, a software developer at Alameda Research, discussing his transition from Apple to Serum and the development of smart contracts on Solana.
topic_summary: In this workshop, Armani shares insights on the Anchor Framework, his background in software development, and his experiences at Alameda Research and Serum. The session includes a Q&A segment where viewers can engage with Armani [t=49:30].
